title: Regnemester
tagline: Sharpen your times tables. Pick a mode to get started.

marathon.title: Marathon
marathon.blurb: All 200 facts, once each. Pure time competition — beat the clock.

blitz.title: Blitz
blitz.blurb: Race against the clock with as many facts as you can answer.

practice.title: Practice
practice.blurb: Targeted practice on the facts you find hardest.

mastery.title: Mastery heatmap
mastery.blurb: See every fact colour-coded by how well you know it.

marathon.title: Marathon
marathon.intro: Answer all {{count}} multiplication and division facts. Wrong answers count against you, but you keep moving — there's no retry. Score is your time; ties are broken by fewer wrongs.

blitz.title: Blitz
blitz.intro: You have 60 seconds. Answer as many facts as you can — fast answers and long streaks multiply your score. Wrong answers don't end the run, they just reset your streak.
blitz.priorBestDetailedRecap: Previous best: {{score}} points with a {{streak}}-answer streak.

errors.failedToStart: Could not start the run. Try again.
errors.failedToRecord: Could not record your answer. The run was stopped.
errors.failedToFinish: Could not finish the run. Your progress was saved but the result could not be loaded.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.empty: Nobody has finished a run yet.

achievements.title: Achievements
achievements.intro: Milestones you've earned, plus the ones still ahead.
achievements.emptyState: No achievements unlocked yet — finish a Marathon or Blitz run to start collecting them.

progress.noMarathon: Finish a Marathon run to start tracking progress.
progress.noBlitz: Play a Blitz run to start tracking progress.
progress.marathonReady: Best: {{best}} — finish another run to lock it in
progress.marathonPerfectReady: You've had a flawless run — finish another to lock it in
progress.streakReady: Best streak: {{best}} — finish another run to lock it in
progress.firstBloodHint: Beat every other family member on any leaderboard.
progress.firstBloodReady: You're #1 on a board — finish another run to lock it in

marathon_perfect_100.title: Flawless Marathon
marathon_perfect_100.description: Finish a Marathon with zero wrong answers.

streak_25.title: Streak 25
streak_25.description: Reach a 25-answer streak in a single Blitz run.

streak_50.title: Streak 50
streak_50.description: Reach a 50-answer streak in a single Blitz run.

streak_100.title: Streak 100
streak_100.description: Reach a 100-answer streak in a single Blitz run.

first_blood.title: First Blood
first_blood.description: Land at #1 on any leaderboard for the first time.

heatmap.title: Mastery heatmap
heatmap.intro: Every fact, colour-coded by how well you know it. Tap a cell to see details.
heatmap.errorLoad: Could not load your mastery data.

detail.prompt: Tap a cell to see your history for that fact.
detail.noAttempts: You haven't tried this fact yet.
detail.accuracyHint: Share of the last 5 attempts that were correct.
detail.recentAvgHint: Average response time across your last 5 attempts.
